minting_now.description: An American Boy & Australian Girl, a love story that never was sadly. An art piece created on a romantic two night adventure(s) with two strangers that fell in love. This is a Digital Asset that was Created-Designed by M & J, "MPJ".

minting_now.name: Monkey King
minting_now.description: A vibrant, psychedelic reinterpretation of the Monkey King, this NFT blends surreal pop-art aesthetics with regal symbolism. The character—a wide-eyed monkey adorned in a royal coat and a tall hat featuring a clock—sits in a dreamlike setting filled with neon colors, distorted portraits, and theatri

minting_now.name: raccoon dog Guardian of Fortune#002
minting_now.description:
raccoon dog Guardian of Fortune is a symbolic digital spirit inspired by Japanese lucky charms, resilience, and folded paper protection.
This character carries a mysterious red fortune book while wearing a handcrafted origami helmet, representing wishes, persistence, and hidden emotional strength.
I

Drafting Ursus - Hand drawn line art from the Ursus Universe, living on Ethereum.

Sketch Ursus. Build Universe.

It's a trap!

Don't give a crap
Heartbeat 

Let the bumbleBASE
Go vroummm

Goes BOOM

Rollin nat 20
Those notes are lucky
Sound grenade

minting_now.name: Boardwalk Club
minting_now.description: Boardwalk Club collection has 800 limited edition NFTs. Beach Club has 720 while the rarer Founders Club has 80. Boardwalk Club collection is designed as a digital tool for active participants in the Boardwalk ecosystem.

minting_now.name: Apes Bunitori Club
minting_now.description:
Welcome to the Apes Bunitori Club! 🐒
Apes Bunitori Club is a unique NFT collection bringing together an exclusive community of collectors and digital art enthusiasts. Each ape is one of a kind, featuring distinctive traits that combine creativity and bold design.

🌟 Why choose this collection?

minting_now.name: BOY:SCAR
minting_now.description:
BOY:SCAR is a collection of cool, scar-marked boys—each one carrying a unique identity shaped by mystery, experience, and hidden power.
Every scar tells a different story. Some were earned, some were given, and some… are still awakening.

minting_now.name: Royal Apes 2026
minting_now.description: The throne has been claimed. Royal Apes 2026 brings a new dynasty of digital rulers to the NFT world — powerful, elegant, and unshakable. Each ape wears the crown of dominance, symbolizing wealth, status, and the future of Web3 royalty. This collection marks the evolution of the ape legacy into an e

minting_now.name: Cap-Ghost#001
minting_now.description: Not your average spirit. Cap-Ghosty roams the digital void, expressing its identity through a curated collection of caps and frames. Adopt a smart specter today.
